query: heavy film grain noise analog photograph high ISO texture
message: sub:film_artifacts/grain — anti_aesthetic — heavy grain, high-ISO noise, push-processed analog texture

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white image showing a densely textured surface composed of countless tiny light and dark flecks. Subtle, broad variations in tone create soft, wave-like patterns of illumination across the frame, ranging from deep charcoal to pale silver, with no identifiable objects, people, or scenery visible.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black-and-white photographic image suffused with heavy film grain and analog noise, functioning as an abstract composition without any recognizable subject matter. Broad, flowing gradients of brightness drift across a tactile, speckled field of charcoal and silver tones, leveraging organic surface texture and material imperfection while rejecting representational content in favor of pure shape and tonal variation.
